report.summary: Cycle-close v13: minimal delta from v12 — no new commits (still e3f63fc). 1 modified learn page (portfolio-rebalancing +53 lines), 2 new OG SVGs, 7 new report/draft files uncommitted. 632 published, 1,244 total pages. All 6 API routes structurally stable. Carry-over backlog unchanged.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 632 published slugs — unchanged since v12
1,244 total page.tsx files (308 learn pages) — unchanged since v12
1 modified page since v12: crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026 (+53 lines, uncommitted)
2 new OG SVGs since v12: og-crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026.svg, og-crypto-staking-2026.svg
euler-v2 JSON-LD gap persists (carry-over from v10)
141 TS errors across 4 files unchanged (non-blocking — ignoreBuildErrors:true)
No new regressions detected in code
Live site verification blocked (egress restricted)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route.ts files present and unchanged: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
No API route code changes since e3f63fc — stable
Fallback coverage still 2/6 routes (prices, market-dominance) — defi-yields, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics lack hardcoded fallback
5/6 routes follow standard in-memory cache + stale-while-revalidate pattern
Live endpoint health unverifiable (degen0x.com egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Deployed commit: e3f63fc (unchanged since v12)
22 uncommitted files: 4 modified + 18 untracked (reports, community drafts, OG SVGs, social cards)
Delta from v12: +7 new report/draft files (community-v3/v4, standup-v11/12/13, design-v2/v3, social cards)
Modified code files awaiting commit: StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, crypto-portfolio-rebalancing page
Build config stable — no infrastructure changes needed
Recommend batching uncommitted code + OG assets into next commit

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta v12 to v13: 7 new report/community draft files, 1 page expanded (+53 lines), 0 new commits
Today output so far: 4+ learn guides built, 10+ OG images created, community social drafts, multiple cycle reports
Carry-over (unchanged): euler-v2 JSON-LD, defi-yields fallback, 141 TS errors, 4 API routes without fallback data
Next action: commit batch (portfolio-rebalancing page, StablecoinYieldTracker fixes, 2 OG SVGs) then deploy
No blockers requiring Jefe attention

sections.title: Carry-Over for Next Cycle

Add JSON-LD to euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026 (carry-over 3+ cycles)
